hero.subheadline: One single pack, no abusive monthly fees. Design, development, SEO and domain included. The site is 100% yours from day one.

items.title: Delivered in 2–3 weeks
items.body: Fixed timeline in the contract. If we miss it, we discount it from the final price.

items.title: One-off payment, zero surprises
items.body: We tell you the price before kickoff and it doesn't move. No auto-renewals, no hidden fees.

items.title: Design that converts
items.body: Every block engineered to push the visitor toward the call, booking or purchase.

services.title: Everything your site needs, under one roof.
services.subtitle: Design, code and SEO in one team. No subcontracted agencies, no finger-pointing between vendors.

items.title: Custom web design
items.body: Landings, corporate sites and multi-page. Designed from scratch for your brand, not recycled templates.

items.title: Online shop
items.body: E-commerce with Stripe, basic stock management and transactional emails. Up to 50 products in the base pack.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.body: Schema, multilingual sitemaps, optimized Core Web Vitals. Your site loads before your competition.

items.title: Optional maintenance
items.body: When you want it. As you want it. No long contracts. We bill only for real work.

process.title: From the first call to launch, in 4 steps.
process.subtitle: No surprises. We show you every step before moving on.

steps.title: Call
steps.body: 30 minutes. We learn your business, your clients and your real goals.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Custom mockups based on your references and your sector.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Next.js + Tailwind, optimized for speed and SEO from the first commit.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We publish, train you to edit it yourself, and hand everything over.

comparativa.title: Why paying once is cheaper than "paying a little every month".
comparativa.subtitle: What other agencies charge over 3 years versus what we charge a single time.
comparativa.footnote: Figures estimated from public quotes by Spanish SMB-sector agencies (2024–2026).

faq.title: What people ask us most before starting.
faq.subtitle: If your question is not here, message us on WhatsApp and we'll answer in minutes.

items.q: Why don't you charge a monthly fee like other agencies?
items.a: Because we consider it abusive to charge €80–150/month for years for a website that is already built and barely requires real maintenance. Our pack includes a fixed, one-off price, and you decide afterwards whether you want occasional maintenance or not. The site, the domain and the code are yours from day one.

items.q: What if I need changes after launch?
items.a: Every pack includes revision rounds before publishing. If you want more changes afterwards, you pay only for the actual hours. No mandatory maintenance contracts.

items.q: Who owns the domain and the hosting?
items.a: You, always. The domain is registered in your name and we hand over the credentials. We show you how to renew it (~€12/year via your own provider).

items.q: Do you do real SEO or just claim it?
items.a: Real technical SEO from the first commit: Schema.org, multilingual sitemap, optimized Core Web Vitals, dynamic OG. We teach you to verify it yourself with PageSpeed and Search Console.

items.q: How long until the site is live?
items.a: Between 2 and 3 weeks depending on the pack. Essential: 7 days. Professional: 14 days. Online shop: 21 days. Fixed timeline in the contract.
Yes, 50% at kickoff and 50% before launch. No interest, no cards, standard bank transfer.

ctaFinal.title: Ready for a website that pays for itself in less than 6 months?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Tell us about your project in a 30-minute call. If we click, we start the same week.

items.a: Yes. You start with one and add extras when you need them.
Yes, 50% at kickoff and 50% before launch.

hero.title: People behind every website.
hero.subtitle: A young team that designs, builds and ranks websites for real businesses.

howWeWork.title: We work as a team, not in silos.
howWeWork.body: Every project goes through design, development and cross-review. No outsourced stages, no losing context between weeks. The same team is with you from start to finish: the person you talk to in the kickoff is the same one polishing the last detail before launch.
bullets: No templates: every site is designed from scratch.
No subcontracting: the Tuagenciaweb team does it all.
No vague timelines: we commit to a date and meet it.

story.title: How we started
story.body: Tuagenciaweb was born after seeing too many abandoned, slow or ugly small business websites. We design every project from scratch, no templates, modern code.

items.title: Fixed timeline
